'''Tela''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] prisoner caught and interrogated at the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Embassy (Manaan)|Embassy]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] in [[3956 BBY]].
